---
id: getreportstatus
title: "Fetches report run status"
description: "Fetches the status of the run corresponding to the report-id."
sidebar_label: "Fetches report run status"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/governance/glean-api-governance
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Fetches report run status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/governance/data/reports/{id}/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches the status of the run corresponding to the report-id.
